About Lyons

Lyons Township High School, located in the community of LaGrange, IL, is a renowned educational institution that prides itself on providing students with a well-rounded academic and extracurricular experience. The school's athletics programs are a shining example of this commitment, fostering a culture of teamwork, discipline, and sportsmanship. With a wide range of athletic offerings, Lyons Township High School provides students with an opportunity to explore their passions and develop their skills in various sports. From football to soccer, basketball to swimming, and everything in between, the school's robust athletics program caters to diverse interests and abilities. The dedication of the coaches and staff ensures that students receive top-notch training and guidance, enabling them to excel on and off the field. Recognized as a member of the state athletics association, Lyons Township High School's athletics programs participate in a competitive and reputable interscholastic league. This affiliation not only showcases the school's commitment to athletic excellence but also provides students with opportunities to compete against peer schools, fostering healthy rivalries and promoting a sense of pride within the school community. Lyons Township High School's athletics programs reflect the school's commitment to nurturing well-rounded individuals through physical activity, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.
